subcodes.first_line: O Nazir! The Greater Branch is present and hath made mention of thee. Praise be to God that thou hast dwelt for years beneath the shade of the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ناظر غصن اکبر حاضر و ذکرت نمود لله الحمد سالها در ظل سدره ساکن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
